title: Unakkulle Mirugam Lyrics Billa 2 Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Unakkulle Mirugam
Singer: Ranjith
Movie: Billa 2
Lyrics : Na MuthuKumar

Unakkulle Mirugam
thoongivida ninaikum
ezhundhu adhu nadandhaal,
aerimalaigal vedikum

Kanavugalai unavaai
kaetu adhu thudikum
Unnai adhu vilungi
undhan kaiyil kodum

Aerikaamal thaen-adai kidaikaadhu
Udhaikaamal pandhu adhu ezhumbaadhu
Vali adhudhaan uyir pilaikkum
idhu varai iyarkayin vidhi idhuthaan (2)

Mirugamena maara vendum
Bali koduthu bayamuruthu
vetta vetta thalai nimirthu

Ulagamadhu urundai illai
Nillal ulagil vadivam illai
Illakanathai nee udaithu
thatti thatti adhai nimirthu

Ingu nanban yaarum illaye
edhukum pagaivan yaarum illaye
endrum neethaan unaku nanbaney
endrum neethaan unaku pagaivaney

Vali adhudhaan uyir pilaikkum
idhu varai iyarkayin vidhi idhuthaan

Mudhal adiyil nadunga vendum
maru adiyil adanga vendum
Meendu vandhaal meendum adi
marupadi marana adi...

Adikadai nee irakka vendum
marupadiyum pirakka vendum
Urakathilum vizhithiru nee
iru vizhiyum thirandha padi

Neethaan unnaku thollaye
endrum neethan unaku ellaye
Nee thottaai kilikumullaye
Valigal irundhum valikka villaye

Vali adhudhaan uyir pilaikkum
idhu varai iyarkayin vidhi idhuthaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Unakkulle Mirugam'?

The song explores themes of inner strength and the wild emotions that come with love, as expressed through its energetic lyrics.

How does this song fit into the plot of Billa 2?

In Billa 2, the song serves as a backdrop to intense moments, highlighting the protagonist's journey and emotional struggles.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Ranjith and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his innovative music style.

When was 'Unakkulle Mirugam' released?

The song was released on May 1, 2012, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unakkulle Mirugam, the vibrant energy of Ranjith's voice combined with Yuvan's captivating music creates an exhilarating experience. The song reflects the protagonist's inner turmoil and strength, resonating with themes of passion and resilience. Set against the backdrop of Billa 2, it elevates the narrative, making it a significant moment in the film. The upbeat tempo and engaging lyrics evoke feelings of excitement and empowerment, perfect for any celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unakkulle Mirugam from Billa 2 is an electrifying track that showcases Ranjith's powerful vocals paired with Yuvan's dynamic music composition. This song perfectly captures the essence of celebration and energy, making it a must-listen for party enthusiasts. Dive into the beats and let the rhythm take over your senses!
stanzaMeanings: If the beast inside you wakes up and moves, it will shake the foundations.
It will take your dreams and crush them, and it will give you pain in your hands.
Without any sweetness, the honey won't come. Without any effort, it won't rise. This is the fate of nature that gives life until now.
The beast must change. Offering sacrifice, fear will arise, and the head will be cut off.
There is no shape in the world. There is no form in the world. You have broken the rules of nature and created chaos.
Here, there are no friends, and there are no enemies. You are always your own friend, and you are always your own enemy.
This is the fate of nature that gives life until now.
In the first step, you must move; in the next step, you must stop. If you come back, you will step again, and that step will lead to death...
You must bear the consequences of your actions, and you must be reborn. In your sleep, keep your eyes open and follow the path.
You are always your own enemy, and you are always your own friend. You are the one who is trapped in your own actions.
This is the fate of nature that gives life until now.
